title: Basket Fill : Ball Puzzle
description: Basket Fill is the most satisfying sports puzzle game youll play! Draw arrows to guide colorful sports balls — football, basketball, tennis ball and more — into their matching colored baskets. Navigate portals, magnets, spinning wheels and wall bumpers across 120 handcrafted levels. Master 5 special balls: ghost, heavy, bouncy, split and rainbow! Score multiple baskets simultaneously for SLAM DUNK combos. Three difficulty modes, 6 boss challenges, full progress saving!
instructions: Draw arrows to guide colored sports balls into matching baskets Navigate obstacles use special balls chain simultaneous scores for slam dunks

title: Racing Cars Puzzle Time
description: Racing Cars Puzzle Time – Play Online Free! Get ready for a fun and relaxing brain challenge in Racing Cars Puzzle Time, a jigsaw-style puzzle game featuring exciting racing car images. Piece together fast sports cars, rebuild stunning racing scenes, and test your focus and problem-solving skills. Choose your difficulty and assemble scattered puzzle pieces into complete high-speed racing pictures. As you progress, the puzzles become more complex, offering a satisfying challenge for both kids and puzzle lovers.
tags: Brain, Cars, Fun, Hypercasual, Jigsaw, Kids, Puzzle
